prompt: An Oriental fantasy-style anime illustration. The main subject is a half-length portrait of a young Oriental girl. She wears a red modern Chinese-style halter cheongsam gown with a translucent light blue-white gauze shawl. Her skin is fair and delicate, with exquisite features and clear, bright blue eyes, expressing a cool and elegant demeanor. Her long black hair flows significantly in the wind with detailed highlights. She wears a golden hollowed-out classical crown adorned with ruby and turquoise jewelry. A large, flowing landscape painting-style scroll surrounds the character in an elegant S-shaped composition. The background is a deep blue night courtyard, with blooming white cherry blossom branches extending into the frame from above and petals falling in the wind. In the upper right, there is a warm golden backlight passing through the flowers and hair, creating a soft halo, rim lighting, and air particles. The foreground is dotted with sparkling blue flowers. The overall style is dreamy, gorgeous, and ethereal, with a high-end 2D thick-painting texture, cinematic lighting, cool and warm contrast, and exquisite details. Aspect ratio 9:16, no text, watermarks, or logos.
